home.name: Dong Ngoc Huy
home.heroSubtitle: I build exceptional digital experiences that are fast, accessible, visually appealing, and responsive. Let's turn your vision into reality.
home.skillsSubtitle: Technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life
home.projectsSubtitle: A selection of projects that I've built with passion and expertise
home.aboutSubtitle: A passionate developer who loves crafting beautiful, performant web applications
home.aboutP1: I'm a full-stack developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications. I specialize in React, Next.js, Node.js, and cloud technologies.
home.aboutP2: I'm passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and creating user experiences that make a real impact. When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects.
home.aboutP3: I believe in continuous learning and staying up-to-date with the latest technologies to deliver the best solutions.
home.timeline2024Desc: Building scalable full-stack applications with React, Next.js, and Node.js. Leading frontend architecture and mentoring junior developers.
home.timeline2022Desc: Started my professional journey building responsive web applications and learning best practices in software development.
home.blogSubtitle: Thoughts, tutorials, and insights about web development and technology
home.blogComingSoonDesc: I'm working on some articles. Stay tuned!
home.newsletterSubtitle: Get notified when I publish new articles, share resources, or launch new projects. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
home.noSpam: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time.
home.contactSubtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's work together to build something amazing.
home.contactDescription: I'm always interested in hearing about new opportunities and interesting projects. Whether you're a company looking to hire, or you just want to say hello, my inbox is always open.
home.thankYou: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
home.subject: Subject
home.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project or just say hello...
home.footerDescription: Full-stack developer passionate about creating beautiful, performant web applications.
